text: This research explores the complex challenges and shifting dynamics of entrepreneurship and innovation within the landscape of the digital era. As rapid technological advancements redefine traditional business models, this study utilizes a holistic mixed-methods framework—combining qualitative insights and quantitative analysis—to provide a comprehensive understanding of the digital transformation. By integrating perspectives on emerging technologies such as AI and e-commerce with practical strategies like cost leadership and digital collaboration, the research identifies the unique barriers and opportunities faced by modern entrepreneurs. Ultimately, these findings offer in-depth insights intended to help business owners, policymakers, and stakeholders navigate market uncertainties and refine their strategic approaches in an increasingly connected global economy.
